# Auto-generated walkthrough guide

# take brochure Family Zoo By Sharpee Tutorial Type HELP for instructions.
#   Taken.
> take brochure
# read brochure Zoo brochure reads: WILLOWBROOK FAMILY ZOO — Your Guide
#   EXHIBITS: Petting Zoo — East from Main Path Aviary — West from Main Path
#   Gift...
> read brochure
# examine brochure A glossy tri-fold brochure with "WILLOWBROOK FAMILY ZOO" on
#   the cover.
> examine brochure
# south Main Path A wide gravel path winds through the heart of the zoo.
#   Colorful direction signs point every which way. A park bench sits beside
#   the path.
> south
# east Petting Zoo A cheerful open-air enclosure filled with friendly animals.
> east
# read plaque Info plaque reads: PYGMY GOATS — These Nigerian Dwarf goats are
#   gentle, curious, and always hungry.
> read plaque
# west Main Path A wide gravel path winds through the heart of the zoo.
#   Colorful direction signs point every which way. A park bench sits beside
#   the path.
> west
# west Aviary You step inside a soaring mesh dome. Brilliantly colored parrots
#   chatter from rope perches, and a toucan eyes you curiously from a branch
#   overhead.
> west
# read plaque Aviary plaque reads: WELCOME TO THE AVIARY — Home to over 30
#   species! TOCO TOUCAN — Its bill weighs less than a smartphone.
> read plaque
# east Main Path A wide gravel path winds through the heart of the zoo.
#   Colorful direction signs point every which way. A park bench sits beside
#   the path.
> east
# north Zoo Entrance You stand before the wrought-iron gates of the
#   Willowbrook Family Zoo.
> north
# take keycard Taken.
> take keycard
# south Main Path A wide gravel path winds through the heart of the zoo.
#   Colorful direction signs point every which way. A park bench sits beside
#   the path.
> south
# Unlock the gate
# unlock gate with keycard You unlock staff gate with staff keycard.
> unlock gate with keycard
# open gate You open staff gate. *DING DONG* "Attention visitors! One hour
#   until closing. Please begin making your way toward the exit."
> open gate
# south Supply Room A cluttered storage room behind the staff gate. Metal
#   shelves line the walls. A cork board on the wall is covered with staff
#   schedules.
> south
# read warning Warning sign reads: CAUTION: The Nocturnal Animals Exhibit is
#   kept dark. Please use a flashlight. Do NOT use camera flash.
> read warning
